Code agent: Created PlatformIO project structure for ESP32-S3 with Arduino framework, including platformio.ini, src/main.cpp, and library modules for Sensor, Calibration, Display, and WebServer.
Files: platformio.ini, src/main.cpp, lib/Sensor/Sensor.h, lib/Sensor/Sensor.cpp, lib/Calibration/Calibration.h, lib/Calibration/Calibration.cpp, lib/Display/Display.h, lib/Display/Display.cpp, lib/WebServer/WebServer.h, lib/WebServer/WebServer.cpp
Created PlatformIO project structure for ESP32-S3 with Arduino framework, including platformio.ini, src/main.cpp, and library modules for Sensor, Calibration, Display, and WebServer.

Code agent: Replaced generic Sensor class with capacitive soil moisture sensor implementation using ADC on ESP32-S3.
Files: lib/Sensor/Sensor.h, lib/Sensor/Sensor.cpp
Backup: /home/annenskei/Документы/GitHub/polivator/.clipper/backups/agent_1781433379592
Replaced generic Sensor class with capacitive soil moisture sensor implementation using ADC on ESP32-S3.

Code agent: Replaced Calibration.h and Calibration.cpp with new implementation using Preferences NVS storage. Added begin(), get/setDryValue/WetValue, resetToDefaults methods. Removed unused load/save/apply. Uses default values 3000 and 1200 for dry and wet respectively.
Files: lib/Calibration/Calibration.h, lib/Calibration/Calibration.cpp

Replaced Calibration.h and Calibration.cpp with new implementation using Preferences NVS storage. Added begin(), get/setDryValue/WetValue, resetToDefaults methods. Removed unused load/save/apply. Uses default values 3000 and 1200 for dry and wet respectively.

Code agent: Implement Display class for WeActStudio 2.13" e-ink display using GxEPD2 library. Added pin definitions, full screen drawing methods for status, calibration, and message display, and deepSleep function.
Files: lib/Display/Display.h, lib/Display/Display.cpp

Implement Display class for WeActStudio 2.13" e-ink display using GxEPD2 library. Added pin definitions, full screen drawing methods for status, calibration, and message display, and deepSleep function.
